An ancient car sits at the side of the road , black and dusty , one of its rear tires flat . source: Jeffrey Childs steps out of his slippers , bends over and sets them toe-by-toe beside his nightstand , and sits back into bed with his wife . Beneath the blankets a nebula of warmth radiates from Angela 's body . He loves this pneumatic thrill of her heat as he gets into bed . The smell of her blood-hot limbs .
